recommendations.title: The Space Between Us
recommendations.overview: A young man raised by scientists on Mars returns to Earth to find his father.

recommendations.title: Security
recommendations.overview: After the assault of a young woman in their seaside town, a security expert and his family get caught in a powerful riptide of secrets and lies.

recommendations.title: Big Top Scooby-Doo!
recommendations.overview: When Scooby and the gang hear of a werewolf plaguing a traveling circus, they go undercover as circus performers to get to the bottom.

recommendations.title: Teen Titans: Trouble in Tokyo

recommendations.title: Gods and Generals
recommendations.overview: The film centers mostly around the personal and professional life of Thomas "Stonewall" Jackson, a brilliant if eccentric Confederate general, from the outbreak of the American Civil War until its halfway point.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Advocate
recommendations.overview: Aspiring Florida defense lawyer Kevin Lomax accepts a job at a New York law firm. With the stakes getting higher every case, Kevin quickly learns that his boss has something far more evil planned.
